criteriaResults.feedback: Change plan.ts:178 hint to 'npx agent-bober sprint'. For consistency, plan answer (plan.ts:297) must also say 'sprint' — which requires plan answer to materialize contracts when it resolves a spec to ready, else sprint would fail there. Update the S2-C6 test to assert 'agent-bober sprint'.

generatorFeedback.description: Hint says 'run' but run re-plans and ignores fresh contracts; sprint is the correct executor.
generatorFeedback.expected: Both runPlanCommand and runPlanAnswerCommand hints say 'sprint'; plan answer must materialize contracts on resolve→ready so sprint succeeds.

summary: 5/6 pass. Embedded branch, fallback, clearContractsForSpec, needs-clarification skip all correct. S2-C6 fails: hint points to 'run' which re-plans and ignores the materialized contracts; should be 'sprint', and plan answer must materialize+say sprint for consistency.
